chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 296 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For orders on letters from trial Court received on 11.08.2025 & 25.08.2025 02.10.2025 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Letters of learned trial Court are to be ordered upon, whereby the applicants in the matter were entertained for bail by order dated 20.06.2022; however, it is reported by the learned trial Court that the said applicants having skipped bail, surety papers are required for further proceedings. Learned DPG, present in the matter, does not oppose the said request. Accordingly, the request made in the communication is found liable to be entertained. Additional Registrar of this Court is directed to do the needful. References stand disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
